reasoning: Since I cannot access recent developments or the Polymarket market directly, I am relying on base rates. Historically, the Fed has long periods of keeping rates flat (such as zero lower bound or terminal rates). I am assigning a 45% probability, balancing the frequency of rate adjustments in typical cycles against periods of stabilization.
